sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33339" key="e)laiokomiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλαιο-κομικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n33339.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐλαιοκομία</foreign>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-κή, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
